incident_report:
# Incident Report: Dungeon Agent Run (Seed 28)

**Summary:** This run failed to achieve any progress before hitting the 50-turn limit at turn 51. Both Agent A and Agent B encountered repeated spurious_block anomalies throughout the mission, with 8 total anomalies occurring at turns 7, 8, 14, 20, 27, 37, 41, and 47—primarily affecting Agent A (5 occurrences) versus Agent B (3 occurrences).

**Root Cause:** The agents were unable to advance past blocking anomalies that prevented normal movement. Neither agent successfully retrieved a key item or unlocked any doors, and no DM interactions were initiated to resolve blockages, suggesting the agents either lacked a strategy for handling persistent anomalies or failed to adapt when encountering them repeatedly.

**Critical Decision Points:** The most notable failure occurred around turn 7-8 when Agent A first encountered back-to-back spurious blocks—at this juncture, the agents should have either attempted communication with the DM or changed their movement strategy entirely. By turn 20, when Agent A hit a third anomaly, the pattern was clear but went unaddressed. The lack of any messages sent (0 total) indicates the agents never escalated or requested external intervention despite obvious environmental interference.
